Marmara Sea Apartment

Art in the Interior

The apartment has been conceived as a living gallery where every room is defined by original works of contemporary art. Rather than serving as decoration, the paintings and textile panels by Nona Dronova establish the atmosphere of each interior, giving every space its own visual identity and emotional character.

Throughout the residence, the artworks create a continuous dialogue between interior architecture, natural light and the changing landscape of the Marmara Sea, making the apartment not only a place to live but also a private collection of contemporary botanical art.

Living Room

The living room is centred around a series of large-scale decorative panels inspired by the vitality of spring. Monumental lilies and unfolding ferns create a sense of movement and freshness, becoming the principal artistic focus of the space. On the opposite wall, two paintings in Nona Dronova’s distinctive Post-Symbolist style — Hydrangeas in the Moonlight and Hydrangeas on the Dark Background — introduce a quieter, contemplative mood through luminous colour and layered botanical forms.

01
White Flowers under the Leaves
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
02
Lilies
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas, decorative panel
03
Ferns and Bells
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas, decorative panel
04
Hydrangeas in the Moonlight
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas, diptych
05
Hydrangeas on the Dark Background
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

Entrance Hall

The entrance hall is defined by the large panel Spring, where blossoming lilacs and delicate lily of the valley emerge around a vibrant orange centre, creating a welcoming transition between the rooms and introducing the apartment’s botanical theme.

06
Spring
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas, large panel

Principal Bedroom

The principal bedroom is dedicated to rich floral expression. The monumental panel Many Peonies is accompanied by Yellow Daylilies and a vivid composition of scarlet poppies, filling the room with warmth, energy and the abundance of a summer garden.

07
Many Peonies
Nona Dronova · 2022 · Oil on canvas, monumental panel
08
Yellow Daylilies
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas

A further painting from this bedroom — a vivid composition of scarlet poppies — will be added to the archive shortly.

Smaller Bedroom

The smaller bedroom presents a more intimate atmosphere. It is decorated with the textile panel Silk Roses and Pearls together with the painting series Energy of the Rose. Soft textures, refined colour harmonies and floral symbolism transform the room into a quiet, contemplative retreat.

09
Silk Roses and Pearls
Nona Dronova · Textile panel, silk and pearls
10
Energy of the Rose
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas, from a series

More works from this series will be added to the archive over time.
